stemHtml: You are navigating in the Northern hemisphere based on a chart with a convergency of 30° between your departure and destination. Which statement below is correct?

options.a: The convergency north of your position will be greater than 30°.
options.b: Your great circle track will change by 30° throughout the flight.
options.c: The rhumb line track will differ from the great circle track by 30° at your halfway point.
options.d: The convergency north of your position will be smaller than 30°.
